testcase.name: Environment variables throws when AWS_ACCESS_KEY_ID is missing
testcase.classname: throws when AWS_ACCESS_KEY_ID is missing

testcase.name: Environment variables throws when AWS_ACCESS_KEY_ID is empty string
testcase.classname: throws when AWS_ACCESS_KEY_ID is empty string

testcase.name: Environment variables throws when AWS_SECRET_ACCESS_KEY is missing
testcase.classname: throws when AWS_SECRET_ACCESS_KEY is missing

testcase.name: Environment variables throws when AWS_SECRET_ACCESS_KEY is empty string
testcase.classname: throws when AWS_SECRET_ACCESS_KEY is empty string

testcase.name: Environment variables throws when AWS_BUCKET_NAME is missing
testcase.classname: throws when AWS_BUCKET_NAME is missing

testcase.name: Environment variables throws when AWS_BUCKET_NAME is empty string
testcase.classname: throws when AWS_BUCKET_NAME is empty string

testcase.name: Environment variables throws when AWS_ENDPOINT is missing
testcase.classname: throws when AWS_ENDPOINT is missing

testcase.name: Environment variables throws when AWS_ENDPOINT is empty string
testcase.classname: throws when AWS_ENDPOINT is empty string

testcase.name: Environment variables throws when AWS_REGION is missing
testcase.classname: throws when AWS_REGION is missing

testcase.name: Environment variables throws when AWS_REGION is empty string
testcase.classname: throws when AWS_REGION is empty string

testcase.name: Environment variables throws when AZURE_CONNECTION_STRING is missing
testcase.classname: throws when AZURE_CONNECTION_STRING is missing

testcase.name: Environment variables throws when AZURE_CONNECTION_STRING is empty string
testcase.classname: throws when AZURE_CONNECTION_STRING is empty string

testcase.name: Environment variables throws when CLOUD_TYPE is missing
testcase.classname: throws when CLOUD_TYPE is missing

testcase.name: Environment variables throws when CLOUD_TYPE is invalid
testcase.classname: throws when CLOUD_TYPE is invalid

testcase.name: uploadImageToBlob — AWS (s3Ninja) uploads successfully and returns a URL
testcase.classname: uploads successfully and returns a URL

testcase.name: uploadImageToBlob — AWS (s3Ninja) prepends today's date to the object name
testcase.classname: prepends today's date to the object name

testcase.name: uploadImageToBlob — AWS (s3Ninja) does not throw uploading the same object twice (PreconditionFailed handled)
testcase.classname: does not throw uploading the same object twice (PreconditionFailed handled)

testcase.name: uploadImageToBlob — AWS (s3Ninja) creates bucket automatically if it does not exist
testcase.classname: creates bucket automatically if it does not exist

testcase.name: uploadImageToBlob — Azure (Azurite) uploads successfully and returns a URL
testcase.classname: uploads successfully and returns a URL

testcase.name: uploadImageToBlob — Azure (Azurite) uses today's date as the container name
testcase.classname: uses today's date as the container name

testcase.name: uploadImageToBlob — Azure (Azurite) does not throw uploading the same object twice (DetectionAlreadyExists handled)
testcase.classname: does not throw uploading the same object twice (DetectionAlreadyExists handled)

testcase.name: uploadImageToBlob — Azure (Azurite) creates container automatically if it does not exist
testcase.classname: creates container automatically if it does not exist
